input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.5.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.5.2.1
            TITLE: the following operating conditions will be recognized:

            CONTENT:
            rule D.5.2.1: The following operating conditions will be recognized:
D.5.2.1 The following operating conditions will be recognized: 
• Dry 
• Damp 
• Wet

final_answer: D.5.2.1 The following operating conditions will be recognized: • Dry • Damp • Wet
